OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: Judge Ellen Chaitin; Clerk: D. Hakewill; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tiffani Chan is present.
Attorney Susan Parkinson appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Nichelle Johnson is present.
Attorney Matthew D. Show representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 504B, for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

This case settled, the trial date of OCT-17-2011 is vacated.
